purpose: Career Grid/Tic-Tac-Toe validation rules. Only core database fields and verified fields are used for playable grid cells.
safeFactSourcesForGrid: honours[].id where verified == true or sourceType == verified
awards[].id where verified == true or sourceType == verified
blockedFactSourcesForGrid: manager links without verified career years
teammate links without verified career-year overlap

casual.description: Good for normal players. Avoids unfair cells.

legend.description: Only for expert/rare challenge; use carefully.
